name: Shanghai Fenghwa Group Co., Ltd
summary: Shanghai Fenghwa Group Co., Ltd engages in the property and hotel management business. It also provides house leasing, industrial investment management, etc. services. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Fenghwa Ballpen Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Fenghwa Group Co., Ltd in October 2001. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Shanghai, China.
